# Mohan Krishnamurthy (Leo Mohan)

> Official website of Mohan Krishnamurthy, an author, speaker, trainer, and cybersecurity professional who writes in English and Tamil. His books span technology (AI, cybersecurity, networking), fiction, business, humor, philosophy and spirituality. He has also co-authored eight technology titles for Syngress and earned IT certifications from more than 20 leading vendors.

Mohan Krishnamurthy publishes online as "Leo Mohan" (site: leomohan.net) and has also written under the byline "Mohan K. Madwachar". Contact: leomohan@yahoo.com

## Books

- [All Books by Category](https://www.leomohan.net/books.html): Complete catalog — technology, fiction, business, general, humor, philosophy, spiritual, storybooks and Tamil works
- [New Releases](https://books.leomohan.net): The latest launches
- [Technology Books](https://www.leomohan.net/technology.html): Hands-on books on AI, cybersecurity, networking and cloud
- [Fiction](https://www.leomohan.net/fiction.html): Novels and short stories
- [Tamil Works](https://www.leomohan.net/tamil.html): Novels, short stories and non-fiction in Tamil
- [Syngress Titles](https://www.leomohan.net/syngress.html): Eight co-authored technology books with ISBNs

### Notable titles

- AI FinOps: The Practitioner's Guide to Managing, Optimizing, and Governing AI Costs at Scale — https://www.amazon.in/dp/B0GX5LQPLW
- The Open Source AI Blueprint — https://www.amazon.in/dp/B0GSJD8HS6
- Secure AI Adoption: A Leadership Playbook — https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0GCPZ4HBR
- Open Crawl: The Hidden Engine of the Open Web — https://www.amazon.in/dp/B0GS9BCPGY
- The AI Stack: A Seven-Layer Reference Model — https://www.amazon.in/dp/B0GSBMLJPT
- Learning Perplexity from Perplexity — https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0FMFRVRXV
- Google Opal for Beginners: Learn, Apply, and Benefit — https://www.smashwords.com/books/view/1893191
- Future Crorepatis: A Child's Guide to Growing Wealth the Smart Way — https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0FDVYKHXN
- Visualize Secure Systems: PlantUML for Network & Security Architects — https://www.amazon.in/dp/B0FGK67B8G
- The Motive That Was Never Spoken (fiction)
- The Replacement Clause (fiction) — https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0GD2DRFM4
- The Blank Book (fiction) — https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0GD23Y7K3

## Where to buy

- [Amazon author page](https://www.amazon.com/author/mohankrishnamurthy)
- [Smashwords](https://www.smashwords.com/profile/view/MohanKrishnamurthy)
- [Goodreads](https://www.goodreads.com/mohankrishnamurthy)
- Also available at Everand, Fable, Rakuten Kobo, Thalia, Vivlio, Barnes & Noble and Bookshop

## About

- [About Me](https://www.leomohan.net/aboutme.html): Biography — from a small town in Tamil Nadu to a career in IT and authorship
- [Certifications](https://www.leomohan.net/certifications.html): IT certifications from 30+ vendors and standards bodies
- [Articles](https://www.leomohan.net/articles.html): Essays on leadership, cybersecurity and the corporate world (published on LinkedIn)
- [Podcasts](https://www.leomohan.net/podcasts.html): Spotify and YouTube podcasts in English and Tamil
- [YouTube Channel](https://www.leomohan.net/youtube.html): Playlists on technology, management and business
